title: EU Tender Monitor
description: Monitor new EU public procurement notices from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily). Filter by keyword, country, CPV code or buyer. Get Telegram + webhook alerts on new tenders. No API key needed.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search for tenders containing these words in the title or description (e.g. 'software', 'construction', 'consulting').

countries.title: Country codes
countries.description: Filter by country ISO codes (e.g. DE=Germany, FR=France, HU=Hungary, PL=Poland). Leave empty for all EU countries.

cpv_codes.title: CPV codes
cpv_codes.description: Common Procurement Vocabulary codes (e.g. '72000000' for IT services, '45000000' for construction). Leave empty to skip.

days_back.title: Days back
days_back.description: How many days back to look for new tenders. 30 = last month (testing with 2025 December data).

max_results.title: Max results
max_results.description: Maximum number of tenders to return per run.

delta_mode.title: Delta mode (only new tenders)
delta_mode.description: Only return tenders not seen in previous runs.

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram bot token
telegram_bot_token.description: Bot token from @BotFather. Use Apify Secret e.g. @TELEGRAM_TOKEN.

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram chat ID
telegram_chat_id.description: Your Telegram chat or group ID from @userinfobot.

webhook_url.title: Webhook URL (optional)
webhook_url.description: POST results to Zapier, Make, n8n, Slack, etc.
